name: Challuru Prathyusha
profileSummary: Challuru Prathyusha is an Indian cricketer. In February 2021, Prathyusha earned her maiden call-up to the India women's cricket team, for their limited overs matches against South Africa. She made her Women's One Day International (WODI) debut for India, against South Africa, on 17 March 2021.
